_readme: Operation Order for the home page (/). Edit operationOrder[] only. Fields: id (number), codeName (main label), title (subtitle line), note (text shown when user taps Intel). approxTime is optional — omit it or set null to hide the time slot.

operationOrder.title: Uniforms — more ballads, more "serious" sound
operationOrder.note: Opening act tone: ballads and a more serious sound.

operationOrder.title: Cold open on screen
operationOrder.note: Video skit before the live set kicks in.

operationOrder.title: Jackson takes Z solo; Zoolander on Wu Tang's
operationOrder.note: Let's Get It Started — Jackson takes Z solo; Zoolander on Wu Tang's.

operationOrder.title: No Time to Die — Boss briefing
operationOrder.note: Being an agent is a dangerous mission. You have to accept the fact you very well might not make it back alive. The Boss would like to remind you that being dead is unacceptable to our high standards and will result in immediate termination of your position. Our missions are too consequential, there's simply No Time to Die.

operationOrder.title: Squire solo
operationOrder.note: To get into the mind of an anti-bureaucrat, which the Boss prioritizes as his enemy number one, you must think like one. You must have controversial ideas, such as the government IS NOT spending our money the correct way, and American history has… flaws? Singing one of the anarchists' songs can help adopt this challenging mindset.

operationOrder.title: Astrology intel — Boss hiring policy
operationOrder.note: The Boss takes astrology very seriously. He refuses to hire Sagittarius because they can't keep a secret, Aries are too impulsive, and Pisces are too emotional. There is a star sign, however, that the Boss attempts to hire whenever possible due to their perfect combination of wit and charm: Gemini.

operationOrder.title: Costumes — more silly and thematic
operationOrder.note: Second act: sillier, more thematic energy.

operationOrder.title: Burner phone protocol
operationOrder.note: Smartphones are not allowed on a heist. Each field operative must carry multiple burner phones on their body at all times. Communication goes two ways: if an active agent or base support is called, you are permitted three rings – ring ring ring – before you must – and this is important – pick up the phone, girl.

operationOrder.title: Character study training
operationOrder.note: All operatives must undergo intensive training on the study of character. Before going out into the field, expect to do deep psychoanalysis reports on the characters of classic films, such as Citizen Kane, Taxi Driver, and the Shrek franchise.

operationOrder.title: Alumni song
operationOrder.note: Alumni song — print a bunch of sheet music for this.

operationOrder.title: Drip solo
operationOrder.note: Encore: Somebody To Love — Drip solo. If not sounding ready, Runaway.
